additionalNames: ミクの日大感謝祭特番 - 制作日誌39 2012, Miku No Hi Daikanshasai Tokuban - Seisaku Nisshi 39 2012
description: "Miku no Hi Dai Kanshasai 39's Giving Day" was held on March 9 and featured both the original -Project DIVA- Arcade graphics. It was accompaned by "Hatsune Miku Live Party 2012 (Mikupa)" the day before. The event took place at Tokyo Dome City Hall.
name: Miku's Big Thanksgiving Day - Special 39's Production 2012
